raw.message: Deine Pikmin begleiten dich, egal, wohin du gehst.

hook.summary: A fast-paced introduction of cute, accessorized Pikmin characters.
hook.visual_action: Three different Pikmin types (Popcorn, Toothbrush, Stamp) flash on screen sequentially against a white background.

scene_flow: Rapid-fire presentation of three distinct 'Decor Pikmin' variants with unique accessories.
Text-based transition asking the viewer which Pikmin they will encounter today.
Gameplay demonstration of the player character walking through a flower-filled map.
Visual reward sequence showing a Pikmin discovery accompanied by confetti effects.
Final branding screen with a group shot of Pikmin and a clear call to action.
audience_proxy: Casual mobile gamers and Nintendo fans who enjoy cute character collection and outdoor activity apps.
